sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28616" key="dusagko/mistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αγκόμιστος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-άγκρῐτος</orth>, poet. for <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">δυσανακ</itype>-.</entryFree>
